title: ZXBrick
shortDescription: A classic brick-breaking arcade game with power-ups, themes, achievements, and BarkinMad Coins.
description: ZXBrick is a retro-inspired brick-breaking arcade game featuring 100 handcrafted levels, powerful upgrades, achievements, unlockable themes, BarkinMad Coins, and fast-paced gameplay inspired by the golden age of arcade gaming.
features: BarkinMad Coins for cross-game cosmetic unlocks

barkinMadCoins.description: Earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic items across supported BarkinMad Studios games. Coins have no cash value and are earned through gameplay only.
